original text:
Las Vegas, Nevada - September 14, 2004 - YesSoftware today announced DemoCharge 2004, an essential product for creating animated demos for use in Web content, emails, documents, tutorials, and training and help materials. It records the use of any application or onscreen activity, including all visible mouse movements, and instantly creates demos in DemoGIF (animated GIFs) format. File sizes are small enough to email, publish on the Web or include in documentation. DemoCharge Professional version will also support Macromedia簧 Flash簧 format and Java Applets and is scheduled for release Q1 of 2005.
Demos can be created in three easy steps that even the most novice user can complete. First, record the use of any application or onscreen activity. Second, enhance the individual frames in the intuitive workspace with special effects such as customized text captions, buttons, images, and highlights to attract attention to important points. Third, have DemoCharge generate an animated DemoGIF.
Quickly create office demos to answer those "how do I" questions about Word, Excel, and other common applications. Email the compact DemoCharge animation to the entire office.
Convey the value of your company's products, services, or Web site through DemoCharge's powerful animated demonstrations.
Easily email or publish online or offline DemoCharge animations to answer FAQ's, train new customers, and avoid costly phone support.
"Cluttered Web pages or wordy emails, tutorials, and Help files with too much written information tend to confuse people," said Konrad Musial, CEO of YesSoftware. "With DemoCharge, this information is conveyed visually to reduce confusion, give more detailed explanation, enable quick decision-making, and transcend language barriers. It's easy-to-use and has endless applications that are helpful to the casual computer user, technical support, sales and marketing professionals, and skilled developers."
YesSoftware offers two editions of DemoCharge 2004 for PC computers running Microsoft簧 Windows簧. DemoCharge 2004 Standard Edition is available for $ 99.95 per license. DemoCharge 2004 Co-branded Edition, best for personal, academic and nonprofit use, if available for $ 49.95 per license and places the message, "Created with DemoCharge" at the bottom of each generated demo. DemoCharge Professional Edition will be available for purchase Q1 2005 for $ 199.95 per license.
Multi-seat licenses are also available. For a complete list of features, benefits, and pricing or to download a free 20-day trial version of DemoCharge please visit the YesSoftware Web site at http://www.yessoftware.com/products/.
All YesSoftware products are available for purchase through the YesSoftware Web site at www.yessoftware.com in addition to being sold through YesSoftware's international partners. For more information, please visit http://www.yessoftware.com/ or call 888-241-7338 from within the United States, or +1-702-798-4370 for international calls.
YesSoftware is an award-winning provider of various software solutions that puts the power of the Internet into the hands of the people by taking difficult and monotonous tasks and turning them into enjoyable, visual experiences.
Business users, developers, Webmaster, consultants, students, and teachers around the world use YesSoftware products to create Internet experiences.
YesSoftware, CodeCharge, CodeCharge Studio and DemoCharge are trademarks of YesSoftware, Inc. All other trademarks are the property of their respective owners.
